_note: FALLBACK TEMPLATE ONLY — runtime config comes from TenantAiConfig database table. Changes here only affect new tenants or when DB config is missing. The SEED_ constants in ai.service.ts are the canonical defaults.

guestCoordinator.systemPrompt: See SEED_COORDINATOR_PROMPT in ai.service.ts — this field is only used as a fallback when TenantAiConfig.systemPromptCoordinator is null.
guestCoordinator.responseSchema: {"guest_message":"Your message here","escalation":{"title":"kebab-case-label","note":"Actionable note for manager","urgency":"immediate | scheduled | info_request"} | null,"resolveTaskId":"<task-id> | null","updateTaskId":"<task-id> | null"}

screeningAI.systemPrompt: See SEED_SCREENING_PROMPT in ai.service.ts — this field is only used as a fallback when TenantAiConfig.systemPromptScreening is null.

managerTranslator.responseSchema: Plain text — the polished guest-facing message. No JSON wrapping.
